message:
bd-19f1/bd-1dbi/bd-33up: remove panic! macros from fcp-core tests + connector verify() fixes

- bd-33up: Replace 8 panic! macros in health.rs test module with assert!(matches!(...))
- bd-19f1: Replace 25 panic! macros in capability_golden_vectors.rs with assert!(matches!(...))
  and if-let-else patterns; add #![allow(clippy::assertions_on_constants)]
- bd-1dbi: Replace 14 panic! macros across fcp-core src test modules:
  provenance.rs (5), lease.rs (5), protocol.rs (2), capability.rs (1), credential.rs (1)
- Fix connector verify() calls to use 4-arg signature with CapabilityId
- Add missing fcp-sdk dep to twitter connector Cargo.toml

All quality gates pass: cargo fmt, clippy, and 1013+ tests green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
